title: diplazium ovatum
intro: Diplazium ovatum, also known as the ovate-leaved umbrella fern or umbrella fern, is a species of fern in the family Athyriaceae. It is native to tropical Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Diplazium ovatum include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, with its leaves being used fresh or dried for medicinal purposes.
